summary: Connected Experiences V1 - Athlete Pipeline Panel testing complete. All 12/12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Pipeline panel opens from NeedsAttentionCard (Director) and MyRosterCard (Coach) via hover-revealed Pipeline button. Panel displays all required sections: athlete header with momentum badge, summary row (schools/response/talking/overdue), stage distribution bar, schools grouped by stage with risk badges, and recent activity.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/roster/athlete/{athlete_id}/pipeline returns complete response with header, summary, stage_distribution, schools, recent_activity, momentum_assessment
VERIFIED: Endpoint requires director or assigned coach role - returns 403 for athletes
VERIFIED: Endpoint returns 404 for non-existent athletes
VERIFIED: Mock athletes without tenant_id return empty pipeline gracefully (schools:[], recent_activity:[])
VERIFIED: athlete_3 (Emma Chen) with tenant_id returns real data with 12 programs
VERIFIED: Pipeline panel opens from NeedsAttentionCard via Pipeline quick action button
VERIFIED: Pipeline panel opens from MyRosterCard via view-pipeline button on hover
VERIFIED: Panel closes via X button (close-pipeline-panel data-testid)
VERIFIED: Panel closes via backdrop click (pipeline-panel-overlay)
VERIFIED: Panel shows athlete header with name, position, grad_year, team, momentum badge
VERIFIED: Summary row displays total_schools, response_rate%, active_conversations, overdue_followups
VERIFIED: Stage distribution bar with color-coded segments and legend (Added, Outreach, Talking, Visit, Offered, Committed)
VERIFIED: Schools grouped by stage show university_name, division, reply_status, risk badges (OVERDUE)
VERIFIED: Recent activity section displays interaction type, university, outcome, date
VERIFIED: Director Mission Control still renders correctly (KPIs, Needs Attention, Coach Health, etc.)
VERIFIED: Coach Mission Control displays My Roster with Pipeline buttons on each athlete row

test_credentials.athlete_with_data: athlete_3 (Emma Chen - has tenant_id with 12 programs)
test_credentials.athlete_mock: athlete_2 (Jake Williams - mock data, empty pipeline)

seed_data_creation: None - using existing seeded athletes and programs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Connected Experiences V1 pipeline panel feature complete. Test athlete_3 (Emma Chen) for real pipeline data, athlete_2 for empty pipeline. Pipeline buttons use group-hover:opacity-100 so use force=True when clicking. Panel data-testids: pipeline-panel, pipeline-panel-overlay, close-pipeline-panel, pipeline-athlete-header, pipeline-summary-row, pipeline-stage-bar, pipeline-schools-list, pipeline-recent-activity, view-pipeline-{athlete_id}, quick-action-pipeline
